# External Dependencies

This directory is for external dependencies (git submodules).

## Private Motor Control Code

The private motor control repository `odrive_smapy` should be cloned here as a git submodule when accessible.

To add the submodule when available:
```bash
git submodule add https://github.com/SergiMuac/odrive_smapy.git external/odrive_smapy
```
